sections.title: 80/20 & 70/30 Plan for Active Employees who are Medicare Primary Due to Upcoming Retirement & 12 Month RIF

content.text: MEDICARE PRIMARY FOR ACTIVE EMPLOYEE ONLY
MEDICARE PRIMARY FOR ACTIVE EMPLOYEE AND DEPENDENT(S)

elements.caption: Monthly Premium Rates January 1, 2021 – December 31, 2021
elements.summary: Monthly premium rates for 80/20 and 70/30 plans for active employees who are Medicare primary due to upcoming retirement and 12-month RIF, showing rates with and without tobacco attestation completion across different coverage categories.

content.text: 1. The employer share when the subscriber is Medicare primary is $405.72.
2. The employer share when only the dependent is Medicare primary is $521.96.
